arts.ttl: Is Christian Pulisic playing for AC Milan in the Italian Super Cup against Juventus today?
arts.sum: There is good news for USMNT and American soccer fans as Christian Pulisic is expected to make his return from injury as AC Milan face Juventus in the semifinals of the Supercoppa Italiana (Italian Super Cup) in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on Friday (January 3). The Italian Super Cup semifinal between Juventus and AC Milan kicks off on Friday, January 3 at 2:00 p.m. ET / 11:00 a.m. PT.
